theme_and_archetype.rationale: Users embarking on inner child healing and a spiritual journey (Course in Miracles) require a safe, calming, and deeply grounded environment. However, to support Tony Robbins-style NLP coaching and 'quantum leaps', the design uses structured, high-contrast dashboard bento grids. It is a harmonious blend of profound spiritual safety and elite performance tracking.

rules.contrast: All text must pass APCA contrast checks. Primary CTA buttons use Deep Forest Green (#1A3626) with Bone White text. 'Quantum Leap' alerts/metrics use Terracotta.
forbidden_colors: pure white for app background (use #F9F6F0 instead)

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing. Minimum inner padding for cards is p-6 or p-8.

grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid with a Bento twist. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Mix spanning items: summary metrics (col-span-1), primary growth chart (col-span-2 row-span-2), daily lesson feed (col-span-1 row-span-2).
grids.marketing_hero: Tetris Grid for any landing/promo areas.

spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons and badges. Inner child elements should feel soft and tactile.

surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphism (Tactile) variant: Background matches parent or slightly lighter. Soft, warm ambient shadows (shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(26,54,38,0.04)]) with a crisp 1px border (border-[#E6DFD3]) to ground them.
surface_strategies.header: Solid Bone White (#F9F6F0) with a subtle bottom border or Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/80) if content scrolls beneath.
surface_strategies.charts: Cardless or completely integrated into the bento grid with minimal borders. No heavy box-shadows on charts.

motion_and_interactions.hover: -translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out, shadow-lg, and explicit hover text/bg colors.
motion_and_interactions.progress_bars: Must have a 'spring' animation to visualize 'quantum leaps'.

shadcn_customizations.buttons: rounded-full, font-bold tracking-wide. Primary button uses bg-[#1A3626] hover:bg-[#2C5A3F] text-white.
shadcn_customizations.cards: Remove default Shadcn border/shadow. Use custom tactile neumorphism (border-[#E6DFD3], shadow-sm, generous p-8 padding).
shadcn_customizations.calendar: Custom styled to fit the '365 lessons' format. Hide standard borders, emphasize the current day with a Terracotta circle.
shadcn_customizations.tabs: Override standard Vercel look. Use soft pill-shaped indicators.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight. Must feel organic.

image_urls.description: Warm sunlit sand dunes. Use as a subtle, low-opacity background for the dashboard or login screen.
Serene woman meditating in a garden. Use for the 'Inner Child Healing' or 'Course in Miracles' section banner.
Sunlit journal on a desk. Use for the 'Reflection Journal' or 'Hour-by-Hour Planner' section.

media.rules: Max opacity for text overlays is bg-black/40 (if dark) or bg-[#F9F6F0]/60 (if light). Do not hide the organic warmth of the images.

testing.rules: All interactive elements (habit checkboxes, daily lesson buttons, emotional state toggles) MUST include data-testid attributes in kebab-case based on role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts via Google Fonts: Manrope, IBM Plex Sans, Outfit.
Configure Tailwind with the exact color hexes provided in the 'colors' section. Map these to logical names: primary (#1A3626), background (#F9F6F0), accent-terracotta (#C25934), etc.

Build the dashboard using a CSS Grid (Bento style). The layout should visually separate 'Spiritual/Inner Child' elements (softer, pastel sky blue/sand) from 'Productivity/NLP metrics' (sharp, data-driven, terracotta).
The 365 days Course in Miracles calendar should be a prominent, easily scannable widget. Build a custom view for it, do not just use standard datepicker.
Implement Shadcn UI, but strip out the default gray/tech look. Replace borders with border-[#E6DFD3] and backgrounds with white or #F9F6F0.
Data-testid is mandatory for all core interactions.
Include recharts for the 'Saltos Cuánticos' (Quantum Leaps) transformation dashboard. Focus on clear, comparable metrics.
